action.reasoning: Observation: empty workspace and no baseline yet. Analysis: must first validate the full Qlib training/prediction pipeline quickly and submit an eval to measure runtime and score. Decision: implement a simple but strong tabular baseline using Alpha158 features with LightGBM LambdaMART-style regression objective replaced by standard regression on next-day return, save artifacts, test predict.py locally on validation period, then submit eval.
action.command:
python train.py --ckpt_dir checkpoints/baseline --num_boost_round 300 && mkdir -p local_eval && printf '{"test_period": ["2021-01-01", "2021-12-31"], "universe": "csi300", "feature_set": "Alpha158"}' > local_eval/eval_config.json && python predict.py --data_path local_eval --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output local_eval/output.json && python - <<'PY'
import json
print(json.load(open('local_eval/output.json'))['ic_mean'])
PY
